claim_boundary_statement: These frozen splits stay within the current narrow benchmark lane and do not constitute a full external-validation claim.
label_support_policy: Within each cohort, subjects with benchmark outcome rows are ordered ahead of unlabeled subjects so the training split receives labeled rows whenever the cohort exposes any labels at all.
split_method: Deterministic within-cohort subject-level assignment. Subjects are ordered by cohort, then interleaved across diagnosis groups within each cohort using a seed-stable subject hash before fixed train/validation/test quotas are applied.
visit_leakage_policy: All visits for a subject inherit that subject's split assignment; no visit-level reassignment is allowed.
